ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the document */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theme of the document */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution associated with the document */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the format of the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document's content */,
  "copyright_status" TEXT /* Copyright status of the document */,
  "rights_holder" TEXT /* Name of the rights holder */,
  "access_rights" TEXT /* Access rights for the document (e.g., public, restricted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "parent_theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent theme (for hierarchical organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., academic, government, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, researcher) */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location where the document was accessed (e.g., on-campus, off-campus) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., comment, tag, highlight) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_tags_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "mapping_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_tags_mapping_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_tags_mapping_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES document_tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document file */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., PDF, JPEG, MP3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_files_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_metadata_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relation */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "related_doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related document */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., version, related document) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_relations_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_relations_related_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
